name: @stubbedev/ms-graph-dev-mcp
description: MCP server for Microsoft Graph API development assistance

scripts.release:patch: npm version patch && git push origin && git push origin --tags && gh release create $(git describe --tags) --generate-notes
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor && git push origin && git push origin --tags && gh release create $(git describe --tags) --generate-notes
scripts.release:major: npm version major && git push origin && git push origin --tags && gh release create $(git describe --tags) --generate-notes
